_schema: projects v1.0 — append new projects, update existing in-place. Updated by /build skill.

projects.name: GA4 + GTM SPA Fix
projects.description: partsbase.com is a SPA — GA4 page_view never fires on route changes, breaking all downstream tracking, HubSpot lead scoring, and attribution. Fix: GTM History Change trigger. Prerequisite for every other MarTech workstream.
projects.next_action: Confirm front-end framework with engineering (React/Next.js/Angular), then deploy GTM History Change trigger
projects.notes: RAG: RED — Critical. Blocks HubSpot lead scoring, attribution model, and SEO content engine. Pre-start audit scored partsbase.com 42/100. Day 7 target per 180-day plan.

projects.name: HubSpot Setup
projects.description: Stand up HubSpot as CRM/MAP. Contact + company records, deal pipeline, lifecycle stages, lead routing, lead scoring baseline. Goal: sales team logging activity in HubSpot by Day 30.
projects.next_action: Evaluate current ORO CRM state — migrate vs. start fresh. Get HubSpot access provisioned.
blockers: GA4 fix should precede HubSpot tracking integration (proj_003)
Omar Servin approval for new tool onboarding
projects.notes: Stack mandate from role. ORO is current CRM — this is an addition or eventual replacement, not a decided migration. Sergio Corona is vendor onboarding contact.

projects.name: Clay + Claude Outbound POC
projects.description: Day 30 proof of concept: Clay table of 100-200 aviation parts supplier contacts → Claude API for segment classification + personalization → HubSpot 5-step sequence → MeetAlfred LinkedIn. Target: 2+ meetings booked.
projects.next_action: Seed Clay table with aviation parts supplier contacts (distributors + surplus dealers). Prompt templates already built in resources/outbound-workflow/.
blockers: HubSpot must be live to load sequences (proj_004)
projects.notes: This is the Day 30 credibility moment. Target KPIs: open rate >35%, reply rate >5%, meetings booked ≥2 from first 50 contacts. ICP: aviation parts distributors + surplus dealers, 10-200 employees, not on PartsBase.

projects.name: Mailchimp Sender Reputation Recovery
projects.description: Permission complaint rate is >25% (threshold is <4%). Microsoft O365 at 27.3%, Proofpoint at 30.3%. 439k contacts, 52% dead (213k haven't opened last 50 emails). Net losing 3,700 contacts/month. Emergency list hygiene + suppression required.
projects.next_action: Suppress the 213k dead contacts immediately. Set up re-engagement campaign for borderline segment before full suppression. Review audit findings at resources/mailchimp-audit-findings.md and action-plan at resources/mailchimp-action-plan.md.
projects.notes: RAG: RED — Sender reputation emergency. Zero automations currently — all sends are manual one-off. High performers: Mike - Renewals (45% open), PBExpo audiences (37-45% open). Audience export available in resources/MailChimp_audience_export_May202026/.

projects.name: Campaign Intelligence Agent
projects.description: AI agent for campaign performance analysis and optimization recommendations via Mailchimp MCP
projects.next_action: Write brief and drop in ai-builds/inputs/ — run /build to generate spec
projects.notes: Seed entry — content domain not yet built. Revisit when content domain is active.

projects.name: MarTech Email Classifier
projects.description: AI classifier that scores inbound lead emails 1-10 by deal value and urgency, writing ranked JSON for Oro CRM consumption. ~500 emails/day, Claude Haiku, <$0.01/email.
blockers: Oro CRM output JSON schema TBD — need CRM team confirmation before Block 3
